scope: Cycle 21: Bug hunt C20 (0 bugs) + feat HubAntre faction reputation bars
overall_assessment: Bug hunt C20: verified 3 files (journey_map_display.gd, end_run_screen.gd, game_flow_controller.gd). 0 bugs found — _process frame cost acceptable (lightweight draw, TAU wrap), _classify_event handles all effect formats, complete_run phase guard prevents double-reward, auto-wiring correct. Feature: HubAntre now displays 5 faction reputation bars (druides, anciens, korrigans, niamh, ankou) with CRT styling, threshold markers, responsive layout, animated entry, and live signal refresh. 29 total bugs fixed across 21 cycles.
